projectDescription: A full-stack Java EE rental-management system for an event-rental business, covering article catalog, shopping cart, quotation/rental lifecycle, employee assignment, inventory tracking, and analytics dashboards.
keyFeatures: Article catalog with categories (MESA, TEXTIL, SILLA, CARPA, COOLER, CALENTON) and image management
Shopping cart with date-range selection and real-time stock availability checks

Quotation-to-rental lifecycle with configurable state machine (Solicitada → Aprobada → Confirmado → Pendiente a reparto → En reparto → Entregado → Pendiente a recoleccion → En recoleccion → Finalizada / Cancelada)
Daily stock reservation system backed by stored procedures
Employee management with role-based routing (Administrador vs. Empleado)
Analytics dashboards for rentals, quotations, client growth, and top articles
Table-combination (CombinacionMesa) configurator linking mesa + mantel + camino + cubre
Warehouse movement card (TarjetaAlmacen) for daily and range inventory audits
Google Drive integration for image uploads
Email notifications via Angus Mail (Jakarta Mail)
publicApiSurface: FacadeRenta.registrarRenta(Cliente, List<Detallerenta>, LocalDate, LocalDate, LocalTime, String)
stored procedure: cambiar_estado_renta(p_idRenta INT, p_nuevoEst VARCHAR)
Entity: Articulo (id, nombre, categoria, precio, unidades, activo, imagen, forma, textilTipo)
Entity: Renta (id, estado, idCliente, hora, fechaInicio, fecha, idEmpleado, entregado, recogido, total, detallesRenta)
Entity: Empleado (id, nombre, apellidoPaterno, apellidoMaterno, correo, contrasena)
